narrative:
Pickerington City L (precinct in Fairfield County) has 953 registered voters, with 55.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.3%, a modest Republican lean of 4.3 percentage points.
